message:
chore(deps): bump workspace crates to 0.1.1 and pin 14 external dependencies

Bump all 13 workspace crates from 0.1.0 to 0.1.1 and update inter-crate
version specifiers accordingly.

Pin external dependencies to exact versions to improve build reproducibility:
- proptest: "1"/"1.4" -> 1.7.0
- serde: "1" -> 1.0.227
- serde_json: "1" -> 1.0.145 (1.0.149 for ftui-style dev-deps)
- tracing: "0.1" -> 0.1.41
- tracing-subscriber: "0.3" -> 0.3.20
- tracing-test: "0.2" -> 0.2.5
- tempfile: "3" -> 3.22.0
- time: "0.3" -> 0.3.44
- bytemuck: 1.15.0 -> 1.25.0
- math-text-transform: 0.1 -> 0.1.1
- ropey: "1.6" -> 1.6.1
- rustc-hash: "2" -> 2.1.1
- unicode-bidi: "0.3" -> 0.3.18
- unicode-normalization: "0.1" -> 0.1.24

Also add check-cfg lint configuration for coverage flags in ftui-render
and ftui-demo-showcase, and remove ftui-harness from ftui-extras
dev-dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-core"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Terminal lifecycle, capabilities, and event parsing for FrankenTUI."
@@ -32,10 +32,10 @@ unicode-width = "0.2.2"
 signal-hook = { version = "0.4.3", features = ["iterator"] }
 
 # Optional tracing support
-tracing = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
-tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["json", "env-filter"], optional = true }
+tracing = { version = "0.1.41", optional = true }
+tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3.20", features = ["json", "env-filter"], optional = true }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 # For spike PTY tests
 portable-pty = "0.9.0"
-proptest = "1"
+proptest = "1.7.0"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-i18n"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Localization catalog and interpolation utilities for FrankenTUI."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-layout"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Flex and grid layout solvers for FrankenTUI."
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui-layout"
 readme = "../../README.md"
 
 [dependencies]
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.0" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 criterion = { version = "0.8.2", features = ["html_reports"] }

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-pty"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "PTY-backed test utilities for FrankenTUI."
@@ -10,6 +10,6 @@ documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui-pty"
 readme = "../../README.md"
 
 [dependencies]
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.0" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
 portable-pty = "0.9.0"
-time = { version = "0.3", features = ["formatting"] }
+time = { version = "0.3.44", features = ["formatting"] }

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-render"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Render kernel: cells, buffers, diffs, and ANSI presentation."
@@ -14,26 +14,29 @@ default = []
 # Enable performance tracing spans
 tracing = ["ftui-core/tracing", "dep:tracing"]
 
+[lints.rust]
+unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = ["cfg(coverage)", "cfg(coverage_nightly)"] }
+
 [dependencies]
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
 memchr = "2.7.6"
 smallvec = "1.15.1"
 unicode-width = "0.2.2"
 unicode-display-width = "0.3.0"
 unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.0" }
-tracing = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
+tracing = { version = "0.1.41", optional = true }
 # Note: ftui-render is the core kernel and should not depend on ftui-style.
 # ftui-style depends on ftui-render (not vice versa).
 # ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout" }  # TODO: Add when needed
 # ftui-text = { path = "../ftui-text" }      # TODO: Add when needed
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 criterion = { version = "0.8.2", features = ["html_reports"] }
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.0" }
-proptest = "1"
-serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
-serde_json = "1"
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
+proptest = "1.7.0"
+serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = "1.0.145"
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "cell_bench"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-simd"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Optional safe SIMD-friendly optimizations for FrankenTUI."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-style"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Style, theme, and color primitives for FrankenTUI."
@@ -10,13 +10,14 @@ documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui-style"
 readme = "../../README.md"
 
 [dependencies]
-ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.1.0" }
-tracing = "0.1"
-serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"], optional = true }
+ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.1.1" }
+tracing = "0.1.41"
+serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"], optional = true }
 
 [features]
 serde = ["dep:serde"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-tracing-test = "0.2"
-proptest = "1"
+tracing-test = "0.2.5"
+proptest = "1.7.0"
+serde_json = "1.0.149"
